presence_results.note_evidence: Monica Hilpert is a 76-year-old woman admitted to skilled nursing facility care today, transferred from the acute hospital after an inpatient stay of nearly a week, for continued nursing care and rehabilitation
presence_results.rationale: Age, SNF admission, ~1 week hospitalization, and rehab all stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: She describes profound fatigue and deconditioning — by the end of the hospitalization she could not manage short household distances on her feet
presence_results.rationale: Deconditioning with inability to ambulate documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: History includes osteoporosis
presence_results.rationale: Osteoporosis history stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: hyperlipidemia
presence_results.rationale: Hyperlipidemia listed in history.

presence_results.note_evidence: prediabetes
presence_results.rationale: Prediabetes listed in history.

presence_results.note_evidence: extensive tooth loss; she chews on one side only, and her meals have contracted over the years toward small, soft foods
presence_results.rationale: Tooth loss, one-sided chewing, soft foods documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: a deep, aching low back pain radiating into both hips, worst with prolonged standing
presence_results.rationale: Location, radiation, aggravating factor, and quality all match.

presence_results.note_evidence: disturbs sleep on bad nights
presence_results.rationale: Sleep disturbance from pain stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: Stands only with support and a fixed target; transfers slowly with assistance
presence_results.rationale: Standing worsens pain and requires support; slow position changes documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Started naproxen sodium 220 mg tablets for baseline pain control
presence_results.rationale: Drug, dose, and indication match.

presence_results.note_evidence: Started meperidine hydrochloride 50 mg tablets for more severe pain, to be used sparingly with close nursing observation
presence_results.rationale: Drug, dose, PRN-severe use, and sparing use documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: close nursing observation for sedation, confusion, or unsteadiness given her age
presence_results.rationale: Opioid risks in elderly and monitoring counseled.

presence_results.note_evidence: She lives alone with minimal social contact; her sister died two years ago, and a neighbor provides her only regular help
presence_results.rationale: Living alone, sister's death, neighbor help all stated.
No mention of domestic violence or interpersonal safety screening.

presence_results.note_evidence: her meals have contracted over the years toward small, soft foods, raising concern for longstanding under-nutrition
presence_results.rationale: Chronic undernutrition from dentition/living alone documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Social work to arrange home supports before discharge and to connect her with community or senior-center programs
presence_results.rationale: Social work referral for home support and community engagement stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: Dietitian consultation for texture-modified, protein- and calcium-forward meals balanced for glucose and lipids
presence_results.rationale: Dietitian referral with soft texture, protein, calcium, glucose/lipid balance matches.

presence_results.note_evidence: Physical therapy for safe transfers, standing tolerance, and gait strengthening
presence_results.rationale: PT for standing, walking, strengthening documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Occupational therapy sessions for dressing, bathing safety, and daily tasks
presence_results.rationale: OT for ADLs documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: History and physical examination and the initial patient assessment were completed today
presence_results.rationale: H&P performed.

presence_results.note_evidence: the initial patient assessment were completed today
presence_results.rationale: Initial patient assessment performed.

presence_results.note_evidence: Development of individualized plan of care with the interdisciplinary team
presence_results.rationale: Individualized plan of care stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: Daily nursing care and supplementary surveillance every shift (pain, vital signs, skin, medications)
presence_results.rationale: Every-shift surveillance of pain, vitals, skin, meds documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Strict call-before-standing instruction reinforced; call bell education provided and accepted
presence_results.rationale: Fall precaution call-button counseling documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: Formal pre-discharge assessment of mobility, medication and meal management, and home setup prior to release
presence_results.rationale: Pre-discharge assessment planned covering mobility, meds, meals, home.

presence_results.note_evidence: Anticipate a stay of roughly two weeks depending on functional progress
presence_results.rationale: ~2 week LOS stated.

presence_results.note_evidence: regimen to be changed if poorly tolerated
presence_results.rationale: Told regimen will change if not tolerated.

presence_results.note_evidence: transferred from the acute hospital after an inpatient stay of nearly a week
presence_results.rationale: Transfer/discharge from acute hospital documented.

presence_results.note_evidence: History and physical examination and the initial patient assessment were completed today
presence_results.rationale: H&P completion documented.
